line_description: A table-like structure with three dashed vertical lines on the left and a parallelogram band to the right containing numbers (655, 5, 6) in diagonally-divided cells. Partial content is visible at the very bottom, cut off by the line boundary.

vision_glyph.description: Third dashed vertical line (short dashes) just left of the parallelogram

unmatched_vision_glyphs.description: First dashed vertical line (short dashes) on the far left

graphics.description: Large parallelogram band extending to the right edge, with slanted top and bottom edges and two internal diagonal dividers forming three cell compartments
Lower row of the table that is heavily truncated by the line boundary; faint shapes (possibly digits or small glyphs) are barely visible
